issue_title: Module @nuxtjs/supabase is disabled due to incompatibility issues
issue_body_preview:
Hey, I removed the package-lock.json and the node_modules folder. I ran `npm i` and after that `npm run dev`. After that I got the warning ` WARN  Module @nuxtjs/supabase is disabled due to incompatibility issues:                                                             15:58:31
 - [nuxt] Nuxt v
test_description_zh: 在全新安装依赖后启动 Nuxt 开发服务器，访问首页，检查 @nuxtjs/supabase 模块是否正常加载，页面中依赖 Supabase 的功能（如认证、数据获取等）是否正常工作，控制台是否出现模块被禁用的警告信息。
expected_result_zh: Nuxt 开发服务器正常启动，控制台不出现 'Module @nuxtjs/supabase is disabled due to incompatibility issues' 警告，@nuxtjs/supabase 模块正常加载，页面中依赖 Supabase 的功能正常渲染和运行。
